textByHash.15ad9e56811a3e4949372c0c5a11ed2ec16586cb: The name's Oriana. Nice to meet ya!
textByHash.2cd48cc5d8cdb01cfc0d6d4ca91e1a0a07d31c5e: Well I'm the best thief to ever live, ain't I.
textByHash.12037b5823622d0eb3641198ffac3062f09fb88c: This place is filled to the brim with wealthy folk with lots of pricey stuff. It's all prime for the takin'.
textByHash.b5ae430f7596a52f8643876970cbe9f98db7ee5e: Now what can I do for you?
textByHash.24f147b37efa516f8e65f8ae95a419a0b2fa437b: Those are keys to the houses round 'ere.
textByHash.3a074c65ce73989903cef0327b3d343d9586aa43: Essentially yes! Though the keys you showed me look a bit old. I'd try to find as many as you can just in case they break.
textByHash.2a1ab58eb7eb1e30641064be089ef1b45ab19404: Yes I can. Some 'ave got houses full of loot, while others spend their days at the bazaar. What do you want to know?
textByHash.f92d78450eba7cdd9ab9ef10640edad90a27cb6e: Some of them round here are filled with loot for sure. They've got so many bits and bobs, trinkets and doodads, that they 'ardly ever notice they've been robbed.
textByHash.81c47ef8fa8cf53c0d630d9c05b797491a996a93: First we get keys for these houses, which are always conveniently under the doormat.
textByHash.973822b70764d61fe626d61624e3e2a9826606b5: Ha... No. I was just pulling your leg.
textByHash.88368a16c2844b9f34ca41eaf63d596c33a3e19d: You'll 'ave to steal the house keys from the citizens.
textByHash.b664a661b14f0a2ef9f12319727f9c3db482e6d2: All these wealthy folk buy and sell property like it's nothing, so they 'ave plenty of spare keys to go round.
textByHash.d7679d54c24ced8f1dac8611a97965e2095ddf1a: We pick their pockets of course. I 'ave some of my crew in the bazaar. If you fancy gettin' involved, they might help you out every now and then.
textByHash.e49e564a1e861222fef46e9ad2d03f369ad4aa46: Once you 'ave a key, you can break into a house. Not any ol' house though. It must be one that's ready to be robbed.
textByHash.08c37adec33af509d3c80511af6c573ff8c5667e: The street urchins that roam the streets keep tabs on which houses are vulnerable.
textByHash.1dfe5e08d9bb677a033311425ece5537f719f6d5: Once you know a house is vulnerable, wait for the owner to leave. Then just simply use your key to get in and steal to your heart's content!
textByHash.c00e6eecedcf824b5ba83694fcea16c6dde58528: But whatever you do, dont get caught!
textByHash.db7164f5a5383b47620dc6b820c8e2a0b291f2a4: If you're not sure where to begin, chat to the urchins in my crew posted round the houses. They'll help you find the next one to plunder.
textByHash.2d54dc75f7eb049ac68ad4d6e5a5ad9b7a3cecb1: Though it might come at a price.
textByHash.b5e7b7b6bf1992ad8616aa6250096f966322c80e: Some of the wealthiest citizens in Varlamore shop in the bazaar and nearby. A perfect place to pick some pockets!
textByHash.e5b8e14dd11017b7b5eb426962d57d438501b423: You'd be right about that. If it were easy to steal from 'em, they wouldn't be so rich, would they?
textByHash.6d9d456e3f389faedf1e6a84554ba6aea6013d7c: Some of the street urchins in my crew hang around in the bazaar and on the outskirts. They might be able to provide some sort of distraction.
textByHash.486ae0b5a82fe3551de731edca9b79f9a34455d4: They get a cut in all the wealth we make.
textByHash.732828a69616cdd52662b8f186731c372a0ce526: Cheeky! You're lucky I don't steal from you right now!
textByHash.1f393142157c166ab521c4738c922fdfe0f363a9: Nah! I 'ave a network of spies and pickpockets that roam the city. You might've seen 'em?
textByHash.edc1652b98cf17ad62b389e87cf2e8c8b5b6aba3: Hidden in plain sight. Perfect! Well it's all the street urchins of course. You can tell if they are part of my crew by the purple sash around their waist.
textByHash.7b59aea04e12ac94eab0afd6da29e1670e1c7782: Most of them lost their parents to the Colosseum, hoping to get glory for their family. The Colosseum 'owever, had other plans...
textByHash.36537fe3eaf889527ea8a1cb1284995697802e44: It really is. They had nowhere to go and no food to eat, so I offered them a home, food, and all the gold they would ever need to 'ave a good life.
textByHash.84afa15b778e00e3f8b760341c8d9634822746f2: No one suspects them, which makes them perfect spies.
textByHash.d4c98450986c4ccff02110ef3f060baf49461e67: Yes they can! Some in the residential area will point out houses free to rob, and some will be in and around the bazaar, distracting the wealthy citizens.
textByHash.cf63665d2c783eb4899cd4e1f72d13b8d72eac39: It sure is, but give them any trouble, and I'll throw you in the Colosseum myself.
textByHash.43a71ff0840886634574726ea413bbe9f241395f: I was an orphan, much like these street urchins you see around the city. I spent my days running around scrounging for food and struggling to find somewhere to sleep.
textByHash.b318dd54f5098c3d16297177470a1e0e41a41acd: Eventually, I turned to a life of crime and thievery. Turns out I'm quite good at it.
textByHash.ec2333f3e96cca80c9789ef77d4e6c4db8bd1bdb: I took refuge in a small spot in the north east of the city. Out of sight, out of mind.
textByHash.007380f190496bae2796e24bc915df9c51db462c: There I met with other orphans just like me. We all wanted payback. Payback on the city for forgetting about us.
textByHash.6e01993879aa5ac727985529968428c1654378da: That may be the case, , but I can't in good conscience leave any of the folk here who are struggling. I swore to help anyone in need.
textByHash.cb66c7981d317b5d1be7f5307be123919a4705a2: While the Colosseum still stands, family greed for glory will cost people. Some just their livelihoods, others their lives!
textByHash.ef0fdd2fbed31ed1675f0116505aa66283846b1d: Well don't get me wrong, I still want to get filthy stinking rich as well!
textByHash.1807c995a2aa6a0b1f4a7623c460e0f7b9b12e57: Want some coin for those? I'll give you a good deal... One coin a piece.
textByHash.9be1fe140ac9151c64cd857e909114dc7e7743df: The thing is, you won't be able to sell those yourself, making them worthless. Still, how 'bout five coins a piece?
textByHash.d20a373bd493b3126ec518faaa66c4bf759b1529: That's crazy! Ever 'eard of inflation. It affects us thieves too...
textByHash.4deeb32711291b9296f6e0277bad2e4370e6733b: 65 coins is my final offer. I've even throw in a little extra as you seem to be the talk of the town.
textByHash.7c8448df20e330eb24dc878d86712f4ca39d77f9: Good. Do you want to trade them in now?
textByHash.8c29f059b6e156e00cd5a773e16630ebe811baa4: There ya go! Don't spend it all at once.
textByHash.498d3229e47e94512483ae3a4eec497392cb4a72: Suit yourself. What to chat 'bout something else?
textByHash.8c5f1c5a09a870f2b6d964fa1fb56845220345a1: You don't seem to anything to trade in to me.
